recentTweets.text:
Permanent daylight saving time brings many health, economic and lifestyle benefits.
 
I am proud of my bill, the Sunshine Protection Act, and the impact it will have on the lives of Americans nationwide. https://t.co/V5tSHk0kvh

Yesterday, two Hillsborough County deputies were ambushed in Ruskin during a violent encounter that left both deputies with severe injuries.

Please join Sandy and me in praying for these brave men, their loved ones and the entire @HCSOSheriff’s Office as they navigate this

Americans are ready to lock the clock, and the House acted with broad bipartisan support to pass my Sunshine Protection Act.

The Senate now must send this commonsense legislation to the president's desk.

Read my op-ed in the @HeraldTribune: https://t.co/vGKlTwnrJg

19 states have already enacted legislation in support of permanent daylight saving time.

I am proud to share my bill the Sunshine Protection Act, has passed the House to deliver Americans the results they voted for. https://t.co/In4ow0iSUm

Permanent daylight saving time is beneficial for Americans' safety, economy, health and lifestyle.

My Sunshine Protection Act passing the House yesterday will be critical to meeting this need.
https://t.co/zRQej8q4yb https://t.co/VI106Ujcs5

Today, the House took an important step toward ending the outdated practice of changing our clocks by passing my Sunshine Protection Act.

My bipartisan bill reflects what Americans have been saying for years: it’s time to lock the clock.
https://t.co/MsQvpHFuhy https://t.co/plgzfs90a2

After years of work, we’re closer than ever.

I am proud of my Sunshine Protection Act as it goes to the House today for a vote.

Let’s get it across the finish line.
https://t.co/UHoKPQsG3A

Check out my recent op-ed in the @HeraldTribune  highlighting the many benefits to permanent daylight savingtime.
https://t.co/eKSRUtkOro

The Sunshine Protection Act is a commonsense, bipartisan solution to end the outdated practice of changing our clocks twice a year.

Today, @HouseGOP will vote to finally lock the clock.

Read more on the benefits of permanent daylight saving time 🧵 https://t.co/zEy0l9k0sF

I am deeply saddened by the news of Senator Graham’s passing over the weekend.

He was a great statesman that I had the incredible privilege of working alongside. https://t.co/oxBEUWYpup

It’s clear that Americans want more daylight in the evenings and to end the biannual clock change.
 
I’m excited to share that tomorrow, the House will vote on my Sunshine Protection Act to make DST permanent and bring it one step closer to becoming law.
https://t.co/UHoKPQsG3A https://t.co/MQcgmNObEt

The war on fraud is crucial to our nations strength. 
 
That’s why I’m proud to work with @HouseGOP and @VP through his @WHfraudTF, already recovering billions in taxpayer dollars lost to fraud and abuse. https://t.co/q1FJASg8RX

Making daylight saving time permanent is essential to bettering the lives of Florida families. 

I am proud to see my bill, the Sunshine Protection Act, reach the floor this week as we work to make your life easier.
https://t.co/FGdNtmOvuV

More time with the people that matter most. That’s what permanent daylight saving time means for Florida families.

That’s why I’m proud to lead the Sunshine Protection Act as it reaches the floor this week, ending the twice-yearly clock changes that disrupt schedules and hurt https://t.co/XdNoMpeNc0

When our border is strong, our nation is strong.

I am proud to see the work @DHSgov and @POTUS are doing through their “zero release” policy as it works to protect our citizens.
https://t.co/8r0jZnPh7W

America is back and stronger than ever before.

I’m proud to see my work with @POTUS and the @HouseGOP through the Working Families Tax Cuts bring results for the American people. https://t.co/09BxvPAkK4

The safety of our children online is non-negotiable.

Proud to support @RepGuthrie, @FrankPallone and @HouseGOP to pass the KIDS Act and take another step forward in protecting our children.
https://t.co/y2XOlqffBy

While a few schools and media companies make billions, college athletes are taking serious risks on the field every single day.

We must prioritize the health and financial wellbeing of college athletes and ensure they are protected. https://t.co/HKRpM1muaR https://t.co/VaHVIJhGV3

Helping people stay healthier as they age matters.

As Chairman of the @WaysandMeansGOP Health Subcommittee, I’m proud to see the CMS Bridge model build on our efforts to combat obesity and expand access to anti-obesity medications, helping America’s seniors live healthier lives. https://t.co/xw67XcKnM8

Making hospital food healthier is essential to the mission of reducing chronic diseases for patients.

As Health Subcommittee Chair on @WaysandMeansGOP, I applaud @POTUS and @SecKennedy’s initiative through the Make Hospital Food Healthier Pledge. https://t.co/ZHu61jFahf https://t.co/3BgfJE7Mfl

It is important that Congress works with local leaders to solve America’s biggest challenges.

I was grateful to meet with representatives from @leagueofcities to discuss issues affecting local communities, including infrastructure, public safety and economic development. https://t.co/yQFVfXxhIM

The American Dream for the next generation.
 
@TrumpAccounts are officially live to help the next generation and their financial future. I am proud of the work @HouseGOP, @POTUS and I did to make this initiative a reality through the Working Families Tax Cuts. https://t.co/eoa3SxfMZD

Hardworking families deserve financial certainty.

Thanks to @HouseGOP’s Working Families Tax Cuts, we’re rewarding hard work and putting more money back in families’ pockets. https://t.co/uQGHtnOiJO

Protecting animal welfare has always been a top priority of mine.

Grateful to meet with the @ASPCA. As Co-Chair of the Congressional Animal Protection Caucus, I’ll keep working alongside them to prevent animal cruelty. https://t.co/g22ZWHb9Pz

One year in, @HouseGOP’s Working Families Tax Cuts are delivering the largest tax relief in our history and reaching families in every corner of the country.

Promises made, promises kept. https://t.co/uhSkfxwRqB

Two hundred fifty years ago, a bold experiment in freedom began, and America became the land of unlimited opportunity.

As we mark this milestone, we honor the sacrifices that shaped our nation and look ahead to an even brighter future.

Happy birthday, America. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/mVFIoWF7wB

One year ago, @POTUS and @HouseGOP signed the Working Families Tax Cuts into law. Workers, seniors and families across the country are now seeing the benefits of the largest tax relief package in American history.

Promises made, promises kept. https://t.co/jQKEKmecSK

Bradenton represented on the World Stage! ⚽️

Proud to have players on Team USA who spent their soccer residency right here in Bradenton and to our teachers for providing a valuable education to them.

Congratulations to @USMNT on their win last night! https://t.co/VtsuTDdRr6

As we gather this Fourth of July to watch the fireworks, let us remember that after 250 years, the American Dream is still alive.

If our history proves anything, it’s that the best is yet to come.

Read my @heraldtribune op-ed: https://t.co/c60DcwTsTK
Good luck @USMNT in the first knockout round! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/R3slq9vXlV

Protecting taxpayer dollars is incredibly important, and we should be using emerging tech to ensure bad actors are held accountable.

Proud to see my AI Tax Integrity Act marked up out of committee to encourage the use of AI tools to fight tax fraud. https://t.co/EtkuSZayB9 https://t.co/bBsVye8rUJ

Alzheimer’s and dementia have a profound impact on millions of Americans who are diagnosed every year.

Proud to lead a resolution with @RepBarragan, @RepGusBilirakis and @RepLindaSanchez to recognize June 2026 as Alzheimer’s and Brain Awareness Month. https://t.co/6YM02cO4Te https://t.co/lL3oS8bV3p

A win for American health care!

The House passed my bipartisan Health Care Efficiency Through Flexibility Act, helping physicians and hospitals begin shifting to value-based care, lowering costs and improving care for families in Florida and nationwide. https://t.co/GKfwYP4Pr9

Proud to see my Healthcare Efficiency Through Flexibility Act pass the House today in a unanimous vote. 
  
By expanding reporting options for ACOs, my bill will reduce excess burden on ACOs and allow providers to deliver high-quality, value-based care. https://t.co/nAqVMTXv1d https://t.co/5gV2k1ub11

Great to welcome FL-16’s Congressional Art Competition winner, Ireland Cates, a sophomore at Bloomingdale High School, to D.C.

Her beautiful piece, “The Capitol,” will be displayed inside the Capitol itself, a perfect tribute as America marks 250 years. https://t.co/DU2X1pBSZa

The Working Families Tax Cuts are WORKING:

✅ More innovation in manufacturing
✅ More jobs for hardworking Americans
✅ More money in the pockets of American workers 🇺🇸 https://t.co/H4OooY8y0M

U.S. manufacturing just hit a four-year high.📈

Thanks to @HouseGOP’s Working Families Tax Cuts, we unleashed $284 billion in new economic growth for American manufacturers.

American workers are winning thanks to investments in American industry. https://t.co/MjQQXTLtDk

Thank you to my D.C. summer interns Alis, Jacob, Paulina and Xavier for their hard work during their internship.

It’s a pleasure to host Florida students in our capital, and I look forward to following their careers!

Apply for a fall internship at https://t.co/o6lAkh5n2K https://t.co/lxWlDLIRNj

If you’re visiting D.C. this summer, check out the Florida Pavilion at the Great American State Fair!

As the U.S. celebrates 250 years of independence, I’m proud that Florida is shaping our nation’s future through our amazing people and thriving businesses. @America250FL 🇺🇸

Early detection is the key to preventing serious harm from life-threatening chronic diseases before the damage is done.

Great read in the @WSJ about new scientific advances that will allow patients to seek care sooner. https://t.co/ksJzlk4Wg5

Great to sit down with small business owners with @NFIB from across SW Florida to discuss the challenges they face as they invest and grow.

I was proud to share how @HouseGOP’s Working Families Tax Cuts made the small business deduction permanent to support our job creators. https://t.co/GppFcOzqc1

I applaud @USTradeRep for taking this important step to hold our trading partners accountable for refusing to pay their fair share for American pharmaceutical development.

I recently led my colleagues in a letter urging the admin to take action: https://t.co/cDnS7wV4Pf

I applaud @POTUS’s decision to suspend live horse exports to Mexico to combat the New World Screwworm threat, but these protections must be made permanent to prevent the slaughter of American horses.

I led a letter to President Trump with 16 colleagues: https://t.co/t1i32rStc0 https://t.co/TJYRBdJGQE

Last week, I was proud to lead a bipartisan delegation to Morocco, Ghana and Portugal as Chair of @house_democracy to discuss the importance of democratic governance and strong trade relationships.

I’m grateful to our friends abroad for their hospitality and dialogue. 🇺🇸🇲🇦🇬🇭🇵🇹

Under @POTUS’s leadership, our southern border remains more secure than at any point in U.S. history.

I was proud to work with @HouseGOP to provide $70 billion in the WFTC for U.S. Customs and Border Protection’s border security operations and immigration enforcement. 🇺🇸

.@WSJ: "A blood test can be a lower-cost, less cumbersome option for people with signs of cognitive decline..."

Congress must pass my ASAP Act to require Medicare to cover these blood-based biomarker tests to help detect Alzheimer’s disease and dementia. https://t.co/lhegcLNRN2

Great to meet with the @TB_Chamber to discuss federal policies that are important to both large and small businesses across Tampa Bay.

As an entrepreneur and former Chair of the @FLChamber, I’m proud to work in Congress to support business growth and job creation. https://t.co/4O7BWhcmjR

Being a father of two and grandfather of ten has been one of the greatest blessings of my life.

Happy Father’s Day to every dad and grandfather across Florida’s Gulf Coast! https://t.co/CMGyYduDya

I was honored to recently welcome Mikey Hartnett, a 7-year-old brain cancer survivor, and his family to Washington.

His story is an incredible example of courage and hope. After battling cancer and enduring 30 rounds of proton beam therapy, he serves as an inspiration to us all. https://t.co/rNTDx2jrIW

On June 20, 1782, the Continental Congress adopted the design for the Great Seal of the United States, depicting a bald eagle grasping 13 arrows and an olive branch with 13 leaves.

Nearly 250 years later, we celebrate the bald eagle as the national symbol of American unity. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/4E9dJht2lj

Serving our community starts right here at home on the Gulf Coast.

Great to welcome advocates with @GulfCoastJFCS to discuss the critical programs they provide, including behavioral and mental health, child welfare, adoption, family support, job transition and food assistance. https://t.co/prSvWyjP2S

The suspect behind the terror plot targeting UFC Freedom 250 at the White House was an illegal immigrant.

Abraham Hermosillo Alvarez should have never been in this country. It’s simple: Deport all criminal illegal aliens. https://t.co/6nhuqEsSTW https://t.co/S4csFJOk5H

Blood-based biomarker tests can help detect and manage Alzheimer’s disease and dementia, allowing patients to seek care sooner.

Proud to chat with @LillyNeuroInt’s Dr. Carole Ho to discuss the importance of passing my ASAP Act to require Medicare to cover these crucial tests. https://t.co/K8o3PmXMsm

Space is the next frontier for cutting-edge development and American leadership. 🚀

I’m grateful to @SenTedBuddNC and @SenatorBennet for introducing my Semiconductor Superiority Act in the U.S. Senate to support semiconductor technology being developed in space.

Applications for U.S. Service Academy nominations are open! The deadline for my office is September 11, 2026.

Make sure your package is complete with transcripts, test scores, recommendations and other required materials before the deadline.

Learn more: https://t.co/Zkjfh4uXzh https://t.co/eafCJAuUgY

Great to chat with constituents with the @ALPAPilots about advancing aviation safety and security.

Tampa Bay is home to multiple world-class airports, including @SRQAirport right here in Manatee County, and is a great place to live for airline pilots and their families. ✈️🧑‍✈️ https://t.co/uVnuISQpfK

Nearly 90 percent of my constituents agree: We must stop foreign nations benefiting from American pharmaceutical R&D without paying their fair share.

I led 48 members of Congress to call on @USTradeRep
and @howardlutnick to combat these harmful policies. https://t.co/cDnS7wV4Pf https://t.co/kGANZRmEZ9

America’s horses deserve protection.

Great to recently meet with @AshleyAvis, the director of Disney’s Black Beauty, to discuss our shared commitment to ending horse slaughter and passing my Save America’s Forgotten Equines (SAFE) Act. https://t.co/kNPMdQQ0KI

On World Elder Abuse Awareness Day, we recognize the importance of protecting America’s seniors from abuse, neglect and exploitation.

With nearly 200,000 seniors in my district, this issue is incredibly important to me. Learn how you can protect seniors: https://t.co/Bsyvn8oxMk https://t.co/gP0wjozbcU

Attention parents and kids across FL-16!

This summer, as we celebrate the 250th anniversary of America’s founding, all children (K-8) can join in @SLOTUS’s 2026 Summer Reading Challenge. Read 12 books between 6/1 and 9/4 and receive a prize!

Learn more: https://t.co/NLB1PNjyPs

kurdistanMentions.text:
Reliable, affordable energy powers Florida’s economy and keeps our families safe.

Great to connect with @TECOEnergy CEO Archie Collins to discuss the company’s continued investment in serving communities across our region. https://t.co/ovwBHiqBt4
